title: Parameters for autoware lanelet2 map divider node

grid_size_x.description: The X size in meters of the output segments

grid_size_y.description: The Y size in meters of the output segments

input_lanelet2_map.description: Path to a single .osm file or a directory containing .osm files

output_lanelet2_map_dir.description: Path to the output directory. Will contain lanelet2_map.osm/ and lanelet2_map_metadata.yaml

map_projector_info_path.description: Path to the map_projector_info.yaml file that describes the projection of the input map

prefix.description: Prefix for the name of the output .osm files
